author: DominicVainMod
content:
Attention, Space Explorers!  
 
 The #14th edition of the Weekly Roadmap is now online!

In this issue, we learn that someone tried to use the #426LIVE event as a cover for espionage, but an unusual guard was defending the secrets of the Council of Peace.
